working_on: Engine apparatus improvements per approved plan: (1) GitHub Issues as cross-session deferral destination + boot-time backlog visibility + scope-collision detection, (2) rewrite health-check around 'is it doing work?' with multi-axis orphan scanner, (3) scope-lock at boot + descope/reorder audit at shutdown, (4) session-end context telemetry feeding cross-session bundling judgment.
